title: triticum vulgare convar. spelta
intro: Triticum vulgare convar. spelta, also known as spelt, is an ancient type of wheat that is closely related to wheat and barley. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation due to its high levels of fiber and antioxidants. The health benefits of spelt include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve blood sugar control, and provide essential nutrients such as iron, zinc, and B vitamins. Spelt can be prepared as herbal tea, flour, or whole grains, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
